s1Body: The report date is selected automatically. For a different day or proxy entry, change the target person and date.
s2Body: Choose your work status for the day and add the site(s) you worked at. Multiple sites are fine.
s3Body: Enter transport, lodging, fuel, etc. You can attach receipt photos and auto-fill with AI analysis.
s4Body: Review and submit. Your input is auto-saved, so you can resume where you left off if you step away.
